error_signature: only the first item is taken into account
title: IMAP Trigger only processes the first email
symptom: When multiple emails are marked as unread, only the first email is processed by the IMAP trigger, leading to incomplete handling of subsequent emails.
not_this_if: Only one email is marked as unread
root_cause: The issue arises because the Code node is not configured to process each item individually. By default, it may be set to only access the first item, which prevents the processing of all items in the input.
fix_steps: Change the Code node's mode to 'Run once for each item'
Test the workflow to ensure all emails are processed
agent_instruction: Update the Code node settings to process each email individually.
